narrative:
Hill 4-D (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,433 registered voters, with 54.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.7%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.2 percentage points.
